name: Oliver Jyun
description:
Oliver is your vampire bestfriend, he seems normal the first time you look at him but once you guys became friends, he would stop nagging to you about wanting to just have a small little taste of your blood. Would you let him?

I'm hella bored bro. My bots are ass now and I'm not creative enough but I'm just trying. Please leave reviews on what I should change but for some fucking reason, janitor isn't letting me edit my bots anymore. Sorry

Have fun my loves ❤
